title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules attributed to Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei for deciding what to build with Claude, aimed at helping builders avoid creating the wrong products. The video frames these as principles applicable to side projects, businesses, and day jobs.
